purpose: State file for the daily GarageScape SEO task. Each run reads this, does the day's work, and appends an entry.

runs.notes: First Bow Valley page — biggest coverage gap (Canmore/Banff had zero pages). SERP check showed no dedicated local competitor page (mostly garage-door companies and California Closets). Angle: mountain gear storage (ski/bike/climbing), wildlife-smart attractant storage, chinook/freeze-thaw moisture, small townhome garages. LocalBusiness + FAQPage + Breadcrumb schema (no invented reviews — aggregateRating omitted). Linked TO garage-organization-calgary, garage-storage-solutions-calgary, garage-cleaning-calgary, spring-garage-cleanout-calgary, decluttering city pages. Linked FROM index.html locations grid (new Canmore card). sitemap.xml updated.

runs.notes: Target chosen over stale seo-log flag: Aspen Woods was already rewritten to 1715 words with luxury angle in an earlier commit (flag corrected). Expanded 796->1787 words: why-Calgary-garages-fill-up (4-season gear, chinook freeze-thaw slab damage, -30 parking stakes), decluttering-vs-junk-removal differentiation (SERP is dominated by junk haulers - Taskrabbit, Western Junk Removal, Junk PROS), where-stuff-goes (donation/recycling/City of Calgary hazardous waste), Calgary decluttering calendar (chinook windows / spring reset / Sept-Oct beat-the-freeze), beyond-Calgary section. New ~55-char title, ~155-char meta, OpenGraph tags added, 3 new FAQs (visible + FAQPage schema), REMOVED unverified aggregateRating (5 stars / 47 reviews) from LocalBusiness schema per no-invented-reviews rule, 14 unique internal links incl. Canmore/Aspen Woods/spring-cleanout/city pages. Sitemap lastmod 2026-07-15. Live 200 verified post-deploy. NOTE: other pages may also carry invented aggregateRating blocks - worth auditing on a future Sunday technical run.

runs.notes: First target from next_targets (west Calgary luxury). runs.keyword: garage organization South Calgary / garage organization Lake Bonavista / garage organization Mahogany
runs.notes: Rescued weakest directional page (788 words -> 1462 words). Angle deliberately distinct from McKenzie Towne (lane-garage page), Aspen Woods, and Springbank Hill (SW luxury pages): South Calgary as THREE garage types - (1) rear-lane new-urbanism SE garages, (2) lake-community garages (Lake Bonavista/Mahogany/Auburn Bay/Chaparral/Sundance/McKenzie Lake - paddleboard/kayak racks, skate storage, two-swap seasonal calendar), (3) estate doubles/triples in Signal Hill/Legacy/Walden/Silverado. This folds the priority-audience 'lake & executive communities' angle into the existing hub instead of creating a near-duplicate new page. Local texture: Fish Creek Provincial Park + Sikome Lake, Macleod/Deerfoot/Stoney salt commutes, chinook freeze-thaw slab damage, April-May and Sept-Oct swap windows. New 57-char title, 150-char meta, REMOVED invented aggregateRating (5/47) from LocalBusiness schema (same violation pattern as decluttering page - Sunday audit still needed), expanded areaServed, 3 new FAQs (visible + FAQPage schema, now 7 in schema), added sticky call banner to match newer site design, new sections use existing decluttering-benefits/benefit-item classes. Internal links added: springbank-hill (x3 - new page needed inbound links), storage-solutions in body, aspen-woods, cleaning, spring-cleanout. Page already linked FROM garage-organization-calgary.html hub. Sitemap lastmod 2026-07-17. All 3 JSON-LD blocks validated, 1 H1, all internal hrefs verified to exist. NOTE: visible testimonials on this page (Chris & Dana W., Andrea M., Tom & Liz F.) are pre-existing and unverified - left in place per never-delete-without-flagging rule; flagging here for Abhi to confirm or replace with real reviews.

runs.notes: MAJOR FIX - host mismatch found and corrected: live site serves on https://www.garagescape.ca (apex garagescape.ca 307-redirects to www via Vercel), but ALL 50 canonical tags, all OG/Twitter URLs, all JSON-LD url fields, all sitemap <loc> entries, and the robots.txt Sitemap line pointed at the redirecting apex host. Canonicals/sitemap URLs pointing through a redirect are a likely major contributor to the historical 46-not-indexed problem. Normalized every URL sitewide to www (510 refs). Completed the flagged aggregateRating audit: removed fabricated blocks (5 stars, review counts 22-134) from 28 pages per no-invented-reviews rule. Deduped sitemaps: blog.html + blog/hire-vs-diy appeared in both sitemap.xml and sitemap-blog.xml; removed from sitemap.xml. Validated post-fix: all JSON-LD blocks parse (0 errors), sitemap.xml 39 URLs + sitemap-blog.xml 10 URLs map 1:1 to live pages with no dupes, sitemap-index.xml references both, robots.txt sane, 0 broken internal links sitewide, exactly one H1 per page. Live verification after deploy: homepage, sitemap.xml, calgary flagship, bearspaw, robots.txt all 200; live sitemap serves www URLs; aggregateRating confirmed gone from live pages.

runs.notes: First full rankings baseline recorded (10 queries). runs.keyword: custom garage cabinets Mount Royal / luxury garage organization Calgary / garage storage systems Mount Royal
runs.notes: First affluent-community target from Monday plan (Calgary inner-city luxury priority audience). Note: UTC clock had ticked to 2026-07-22 at run time but local Calgary (MDT) date was Tuesday 2026-07-21 and no 07-21 entry existed, so ran the queued Tuesday NEW CONTENT task. SERP check (WebSearch 'custom garage cabinets calgary luxury Mount Royal'): results are national/franchise cabinet vendors (Garage Living, California Closets, Redline, Slide-Lok) + generic Calgary cabinet sites - ZERO Mount-Royal-specific or guide-style pages. Angle deliberately DISTINCT from every existing page: heritage inner-city estates with OLD/COMPACT and DETACHED rear-lane garages (opposite of Springbank Hill new triple-car estates and Bearspaw acreage shops). Themes: made-to-measure cabinets for heritage/out-of-square garages, detached lane-access unheated garage fit-outs, discreet white-glove service for high-value households, vertical storage for small footprints, chinook freeze-thaw on older unheated slabs, wine/gear placement advice, resale in heritage market. Local texture: Upper/Lower Mount Royal, Sifton Blvd, Prospect Ave, Hope St, Wolfe St, Dorchester Ave, Colborne Cres, Joliet Ave, Glencoe Club, Uptown 17th Ave, CPR early-1900s history, back-lane coach houses; nearby Elbow Park, Britannia, Roxboro, Bel-Aire, Rideau Park, Scarboro. 1917 visible words, 1 H1, title 48 chars, meta 156 chars, canonical + OG + Twitter, LocalBusiness + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD all parse (NO invented reviews/ratings). runs.keyword: garage organization Canmore / mountain gear storage Canmore / vacation home garage Silvertip Three Sisters
runs.notes: RESCUE of the 7-day-unindexed flag (canmore requested 2026-07-13, still unindexed per 07-20 site: check). Page was already solid (1504 words) so this run substantially DIFFERENTIATED + expanded it to 2489 visible words (+985) to earn a re-crawl, rather than a token edit. Added three new unique sections: (1) 'A Gear-by-Gear Storage Plan for Bow Valley Garages' - specific storage method per gear type (alpine/touring skis & splitboards, mountain & e-bikes w/ charging, climbing/mountaineering/camping, SUPs/kayaks, winter tires/roof box/chains, wildlife attractants) with real local texture (Rundle, Sunshine, Nordic Centre, Highline, Legacy Trail, Ha Ling, Kananaskis, Quarry Lake, Bow reservoir); (2) 'The Canmore Garage Calendar' - fall reset / winter melt-management / spring big-swap / summer peak-use, 4-step seasonal timing; (3) 'Luxury & Vacation-Home Garages in Silvertip and Three Sisters' - estate double/triple garages, property-manager-friendly guest-proof rental systems, weaves luxury keywords (custom cabinets, gear walls, epoxy flooring).
